title: Add search bar for conversations and memories
description: Implement a global search bar that allows users to search across all agent conversations and stored memories.

title: Add settings page for agent configuration
description: Create a settings page in the workspace UI where users can adjust agent parameters like temperature, max tokens, and system prompts.

title: Add pin/favorite feature for conversations
description: Allow users to pin or favorite important conversations for quick access from the workspace sidebar.

title: Add dark mode toggle to workspace UI
description: Implement a dark/light mode switch in the workspace header, storing preference in localStorage.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
description: Implement keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+S for save, Ctrl+F for search) in the workspace interface.

title: Add export chat history feature
description: Allow users to export their chat history as a JSON or text file for backup or sharing.

title: Add dark mode toggle to workspace UI
description: Implement a dark/light mode switch in the workspace header, storing preference in localStorage.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
description: Implement keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+S for save, Ctrl+F for search) in the workspace interface.

title: Add export chat history feature
description: Allow users to export their chat history as a JSON or text file for backup or sharing.

title: Add save/load agent configuration profiles
description: Allow users to save their agent settings (temperature, max tokens, system prompts) as profiles and load them later.

title: Add error boundaries to UI components
description: Implement React error boundaries to gracefully handle UI errors and display fallback UI instead of crashing.

title: Add conversation sharing via shareable links
description: Generate a shareable link for a conversation that allows others to view the chat history (with optional expiration).

title: Add ability to save and load chat sessions as files
description: Allow users to save their current chat session to a file and load it later to continue the conversation.

title: Add integration with external calendar services
description: Enable users to connect their Google Calendar or Outlook to view and manage meetings within the Hermes workspace.

title: Add voice input for chat messages
description: Allow users to speak their messages instead of typing, using the browser's Speech Recognition API.
